name: nostr-skills
description: Nostr protocol skills. Covers direct Nostr interaction via nak CLI, Marmot Protocol (MLS+Nostr group messaging), remote signing (NIP-46 bunkers, NIP-07, NIP-55, key management), and cross-language SDK selection across nostr-tools, NDK, rust-nostr, fiatjaf.com/nostr, nostr-java, nostr4j, nostr-sdk-jvm, nostr-sdk-ios, nostr-sdk-swift, pynostr, and more.
